scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names backend,frontend,desktop --prefix-colors blue,green,magenta "npm run backend:dev" "npm run frontend:dev" "npm run desktop:runtime"
scripts.desktop:check: node --check desktop/main.js && node --check desktop/preload.js && node --check desktop/runtime.js
scripts.test: npm run backend:test && npm run frontend:test && npm run desktop:test && npm run desktop:check
scripts.build: npm run frontend:build && npm run desktop:check
